figures.caption: Fig. 2: The t-SNE visualization [37] results of feature representations on the STL-10 dataset for different SOTA methods.

Fig. 3: The flowchart of our proposed GMAE. Specifically, given the multi-view feature matrix, GMAE first employs the Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) as generators to encode view-specific and -common representations (i.e., Zv and Cv) for all views. After that, GMAE investigates the view-adversarial discrimination loss Lv Dis and correlation loss Lv Cor to obtain clean and disentangled information. Meanwhile, GMAE envisages the reconstruction loss Lv Rec and self-consistent alignment loss LCon to preserve a more discriminative and disentangled representation for the final clustering task.
